ns1:revision.ns1:text:
Australia LUG 2023 was held on October 16th at the [https://www.rydges.com/accommodation/brisbane-qld/brisbane-south-bank/ Rydges South Bank Hotel] in [https://www.brisbane.qld.gov.au/ Brisbane], QLD in conjunction with the [https://conference.eresearch.edu.au/ eResearch Conference].
[[File:eResearch-Australasia-Lustre-Users-Group-2023.jpg]]
== Australia LUG 2023 Agenda == {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 11:15-11:20''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-Agenda.pdf|Welcome and Agenda]]''' : Justin Glen, DDN
|- |''' 11:20-12:05''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-Lustre_Future_Roadmap.pdf|Keynote: Lustre Future Roadmap]]''' : Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud
|- |''' 12:05-13:00''' |'''Lunch'''
|- |''' 13:00-13:15''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-NCI_Site_Update.pdf|NCI Site Update]]''' : Daniel Rodwell, NCI
|- |''' 13:15-13:30''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-Bureau_HPC_Site_Report.pdf|Bureau of Meteorology Site Report]]''' : Malcolm Cowe, Bureau of Meteorology
|- |''' 13:30-13:45''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-CSIRO.pdf|CSIRO Site Update]]''' : Lilian Mulama, CSIRO
|- |''' 13:45-14:00''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-DDN_Lustre_Support_Requirements.pdf|Filing Effective Lustre Support Tickets]]''' : Ian Costello, DDN
|- |''' 14:00-14:20''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-Developing_NFS_SMB_Gateway_for_Lustre.pdf|Developing an NFS and SMB Gateway for Lustre]]''' : Martin Schwenke, DDN
|- |''' 14:20-15:00''' |'''[[Media:AusLUG2023-EXAScaler_Advanced_Features.pdf|Sponsor Talk – EXAScaler Advanced Features]]''' : Andreas Dilger, DDN
|- |'''15:00-15:15''' |'''Afternoon tea'''
|- |'''15:15-15:45''' |'''Lustre Community Discussion & Training''' : Daniel Rodwell, NCI |}
